<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Handmade Blooms – Crochet Flowers</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --cream: #faf6f0; --warm: #f5ede0; --rose: #c9736a; --rose-light: #e8a89f;
    --green: #5a7a5a; --brown: #6b4f3a; --text: #2d1f14; --text-light: #7a6255; --gold: #c4943a;
  }
  * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
  body { font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; background:var(--cream); color:var(--text); }

  nav { background:white; border-bottom:1px solid #e8ddd5; padding:0 5vw; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; height:64px; position:sticky; top:0; z-index:100; box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(100,60,30,.06); }
  .logo { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:1.7rem; font-weight:600; color:var(--rose); }
  .logo span { color:var(--green); }
  .cart-btn { background:var(--rose); color:white; border:none; padding:10px 22px; border-radius:30px; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:.9rem; cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; transition:all .2s; font-weight:500; }
  .cart-btn:hover { background:var(--brown); transform:translateY(-1px); }
  .cart-count { background:white; color:var(--rose); border-radius:50%; width:20px; height:20px; font-size:.75rem; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-weight:700; }

  .hero { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fdf8f3,#f5ede0 50%,#eee5f5); padding:70px 5vw 60px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:40px; flex-wrap:wrap; overflow:hidden; position:relative; }
  .hero-text { max-width:520px; }
  .hero-badge { display:inline-block; background:var(--green); color:white; font-size:.75rem; padding:4px 14px; border-radius:20px; letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:18px; }
  .hero h1 { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:clamp(2.2rem,5vw,3.5rem); line-height:1.15; margin-bottom:18px; }
  .hero h1 em { color:var(--rose); font-style:italic; }
  .hero p { color:var(--text-light); line-height:1.7; max-width:420px; margin-bottom:28px; }
  .hero-cta { background:var(--rose); color:white; padding:14px 32px; border-radius:30px; text-decoration:none; font-weight:500; display:inline-block; transition:all .2s; }
  .hero-cta:hover { background:var(--brown); transform:translateY(-2px); box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(180,80,70,.35); }
  .hero-flowers { display:flex; gap:12px; align-items:flex-end; }
  .hero-img { width:120px; height:160px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:16px; box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(100,60,30,.15); transition:transform .3s; }
  .hero-img:hover { transform:translateY(-6px); }
  .hero-img:nth-child(2) { height:185px; margin-bottom:10px; }

  .section { padding:60px 5vw; }
  .section-header { text-align:center; margin-bottom:44px; }
  .section-header h2 { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:2.2rem; margin-bottom:8px; }
  .section-header p { color:var(--text-light); font-size:.95rem; }
  .divider { width:50px; height:3px; background:var(--rose-light); border-radius:2px; margin:12px auto; }

  .products-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(260px,1fr)); gap:28px; }
  .card { background:white; border-radius:20px; overflow:hidden; box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(100,60,30,.08); transition:all .3s; position:relative; }
  .card:hover { transform:translateY(-6px); box-shadow:0 14px 40px rgba(100,60,30,.16); }
  .card-img-wrap { position:relative; overflow:hidden; height:320px; background:#f9f4ef; }
  .card-img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; object-position:center; transition:transform .4s; }
  .card:hover .card-img { transform:scale(1.05); }
  .card-tag { position:absolute; top:14px; left:14px; background:var(--rose); color:white; font-size:.7rem; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:20px; font-weight:500; }
  .card-tag.green { background:var(--green); }
  .card-tag.gold { background:var(--gold); }
  .card-body { padding:20px 22px 22px; }
  .card-name { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:1.25rem; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:6px; }
  .card-desc { color:var(--text-light); font-size:.84rem; line-height:1.6; margin-bottom:16px; min-height:56px; }
  .card-footer { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; }
  .price { font-size:1.4rem; color:var(--rose); font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; }
  .price span { font-size:.85rem; color:var(--text-light); font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; }
  .add-btn { background:var(--cream); color:var(--rose); border:1.5px solid var(--rose-light); padding:9px 18px; border-radius:30px; cursor:pointer; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:.85rem; font-weight:500; transition:all .2s; }
  .add-btn:hover { background:var(--rose); color:white; border-color:var(--rose); }
  .add-btn.added { background:var(--green); color:white; border-color:var(--green); }

  .overlay { display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(0,0,0,.4); z-index:200; backdrop-filter:blur(2px); }
  .overlay.open { display:block; }
  .cart-drawer { position:fixed; right:0; top:0; height:100%; width:min(400px,100vw); background:white; z-index:201; transform:translateX(100%); transition:transform .35s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); box-shadow:-8px 0 40px rgba(0,0,0,.15); display:flex; flex-direction:column; }
  .cart-drawer.open { transform:translateX(0); }
  .cart-header { padding:24px; border-bottom:1px solid #f0e8e0; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; }
  .cart-header h3 { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:1.5rem; }
  .close-btn { background:none; border:none; font-size:1.6rem; cursor:pointer; color:var(--text-light); }
  .cart-items { flex:1; overflow-y:auto; padding:16px 24px; }
  .cart-empty { text-align:center; padding:60px 20px; color:var(--text-light); }
  .cart-empty .emoji { font-size:3rem; margin-bottom:16px; }
  .cart-item { display:flex; gap:14px; padding:14px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #f5ede8; align-items:center; }
  .cart-item-img { width:64px; height:85px; border-radius:10px; object-fit:cover; }
  .cart-item-info { flex:1; }
  .cart-item-name { font-size:.9rem; font-weight:500; margin-bottom:4px; }
  .cart-item-price { color:var(--rose); font-size:.9rem; }
  .cart-item-qty { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; margin-top:6px; }
  .qty-btn { width:24px; height:24px; border-radius:50%; border:1px solid #e0d5ce; background:none; cursor:pointer; font-size:.9rem; transition:all .15s; }
  .qty-btn:hover { background:var(--rose); color:white; border-color:var(--rose); }
  .qty-num { font-size:.85rem; min-width:16px; text-align:center; }
  .cart-item-remove { color:#ccc; background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; font-size:1.1rem; padding:4px; transition:color .2s; }
  .cart-item-remove:hover { color:var(--rose); }
  .cart-footer { padding:20px 24px 28px; border-top:1px solid #f0e8e0; }
  .cart-total { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-bottom:18px; }
  .cart-total-label { color:var(--text-light); }
  .cart-total-amount { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:1.8rem; color:var(--rose); font-weight:600; }
  .whatsapp-btn { width:100%; background:#25D366; color:white; border:none; padding:16px; border-radius:30px; font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; font-size:1rem; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:10px; transition:all .2s; }
  .whatsapp-btn:hover { background:#1ebe5d; transform:translateY(-2px); box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(37,211,102,.4); }
  .note { font-size:.78rem; color:var(--text-light); text-align:center; margin-top:10px; }

  .features { background:white; }
  .features-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(200px,1fr)); gap:28px; }
  .feature { text-align:center; padding:28px 16px; }
  .feature-icon { font-size:2.2rem; margin-bottom:14px; }
  .feature h4 { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:1.15rem; margin-bottom:6px; }
  .feature p { color:var(--text-light); font-size:.83rem; line-height:1.6; }

  footer { background:var(--brown); color:#f0e8e0; text-align:center; padding:36px 5vw; }
  footer h3 { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:1.5rem; margin-bottom:8px; color:white; }
  footer p { font-size:.85rem; color:#d4bfb0; line-height:1.7; }

  .toast { position:fixed; bottom:30px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(80px); background:var(--green); color:white; padding:12px 28px; border-radius:30px; font-size:.9rem; z-index:300; transition:transform .3s; box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2); pointer-events:none; }
  .toast.show { transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }

  @media(max-width:600px) { .hero-flowers { display:none; } .hero { padding:50px 5vw 40px; } }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <div class="logo">Handmade <span>Blooms</span></div>
  <button class="cart-btn" onclick="openCart()">🛒 Cart <span class="cart-count" id="cartCount">0</span></button>
</nav>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-text">
    <span class="hero-badge">✿ 100% Handcrafted</span>
    <h1>Flowers that <em>never</em> fade, beauty that lasts <em>forever</em></h1>
    <p>Each bloom is lovingly hand-crocheted — a perfect gift, a charming home accent, or a keepsake that will last a lifetime.</p>
    <a href="#shop" class="hero-cta">Shop All Flowers →</a>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-flowers">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="hero-img" alt="Yellow Rose">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="hero-img" alt="Sunflower">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="hero-img" alt="Red Rose">
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section" id="shop">
  <div class="section-header">
    <h2>Our Crochet Collection</h2>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <p>Each piece handcrafted with premium yarn — no two are exactly alike ✿</p>
  </div>
  <div class="products-grid" id="productsGrid"></div>
</section>

<section class="section features">
  <div class="features-grid">
    <div class="feature"><div class="feature-icon">🌿</div><h4>Handmade with Love</h4><p>Every flower is individually crocheted — never mass-produced, always unique.</p></div>
    <div class="feature"><div class="feature-icon">🎁</div><h4>Perfect for Gifting</h4><p>Ideal for birthdays, anniversaries, and any occasion that deserves something special.</p></div>
    <div class="feature"><div class="feature-icon">✨</div><h4>Lasts a Lifetime</h4><p>Unlike real flowers, these blooms stay beautiful forever — zero maintenance needed.</p></div>
    <div class="feature"><div class="feature-icon">📦</div><h4>Made to Order</h4><p>Custom colours available on request. Message us on WhatsApp for custom orders.</p></div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <h3>✿ Handmade Blooms ✿</h3>
  <p>Bringing joy, one stitch at a time.<br>All flowers are handmade to order with love.</p>
</footer>

<div class="overlay" id="overlay" onclick="closeCart()"></div>
<div class="cart-drawer" id="cartDrawer">
  <div class="cart-header">
    <h3>🛒 Your Cart</h3>
    <button class="close-btn" onclick="closeCart()">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div class="cart-items" id="cartItems">
    <div class="cart-empty"><div class="emoji">🌸</div><p>Your cart is empty.<br>Add some beautiful flowers!</p></div>
  </div>
  <div class="cart-footer" id="cartFooter" style="display:none">
    <div class="cart-total">
      <span class="cart-total-label">Total</span>
      <span class="cart-total-amount" id="cartTotal">₹0</span>
    </div>
    <button class="whatsapp-btn" onclick="orderViaWhatsApp()">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 32 32" width="22" height="22" fill="white"><path d="M16 0C7.164 0 0 7.163 0 16c0 2.82.736 5.46 2.024 7.745L0 32l8.49-2.006A15.93 15.93 0 0016 32c8.836 0 16-7.163 16-16S24.836 0 16 0zm0 29.333a13.27 13.27 0 01-6.77-1.848l-.487-.29-5.037 1.19 1.23-4.905-.32-.505A13.27 13.27 0 012.667 16C2.667 8.636 8.636 2.667 16 2.667S29.333 8.636 29.333 16 23.364 29.333 16 29.333zm7.28-9.93c-.4-.2-2.358-1.163-2.724-1.295-.366-.133-.632-.2-.898.2-.267.4-1.03 1.295-1.264 1.56-.232.267-.464.3-.865.1-.4-.2-1.69-.623-3.22-1.985-1.19-1.06-1.993-2.37-2.226-2.77-.232-.4-.024-.616.175-.815.18-.18.4-.466.6-.7.2-.233.267-.4.4-.665.133-.267.067-.5-.033-.7-.1-.2-.898-2.163-1.23-2.96-.324-.78-.654-.674-.898-.686l-.765-.013c-.267 0-.7.1-1.065.5-.367.4-1.397 1.364-1.397 3.327s1.43 3.86 1.63 4.126c.2.267 2.815 4.298 6.82 6.03.954.41 1.698.657 2.28.84.957.304 1.83.26 2.52.158.77-.114 2.358-.963 2.69-1.893.333-.93.333-1.73.234-1.893-.1-.167-.366-.267-.766-.466z"/></svg>
      Order via WhatsApp
    </button>
    <p class="note">We'll confirm your order and arrange delivery via WhatsApp 📲</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="toast" id="toast"></div>

<script>
const products = [{"id": 1, "name": "Yellow Rose in Pot", "price": 250, "desc": "A cheerful handcrafted yellow rose, lovingly crocheted and nestled in a cosy yarn pot. Brightens any desk or shelf \u2014 never wilts!", "img": "", "tag": "Bestseller"}, {"id": 2, "name": "Red Rose in Pot", "price": 280, "desc": "A timeless symbol of love, handmade in rich red yarn with green leaves, set in a charming crochet pot. Perfect for gifting.", "img": "", "tag": "Gift Favourite"}, {"id": 3, "name": "Sunflower in Pot", "price": 220, "desc": "Sunshine in your home! A bright mini sunflower with a detailed dark centre, handcrafted with care and potted in soft grey yarn.", "img": "", "tag": ""}, {"id": 4, "name": "White Rose (Stem)", "price": 180, "desc": "Delicate and dreamy \u2014 a pure white crocheted rose on a slender green stem. Minimalist beauty for vases, bouquets, or gifting.", "img": "", "tag": "New"}, {"id": 5, "name": "Cream Pom Flower (Stem)", "price": 150, "desc": "A soft, fluffy cream-coloured bloom on a long stem. Light, whimsical, and uniquely textured \u2014 adds a boho touch to any space.", "img": "", "tag": ""}, {"id": 6, "name": "Large Sunflower (Stem)", "price": 300, "desc": "Our showstopper! A big, bold sunflower with double-layered petals and a chunky brown centre. Stunning in a tall vase.", "img": "", "tag": "Popular"}];
let cart = [];

function renderProducts() {
  document.getElementById('productsGrid').innerHTML = products.map(p => {
    const tc = p.tag==='New'?'green':p.tag==='Popular'?'gold':'';
    return `<div class="card">
      <div class="card-img-wrap">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,${p.img}" class="card-img" alt="${p.name}" loading="lazy">
        ${p.tag?`<span class="card-tag ${tc}">${p.tag}</span>`:''}
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="card-name">${p.name}</div>
        <div class="card-desc">${p.desc}</div>
        <div class="card-footer">
          <div class="price">₹${p.price} <span>/ piece</span></div>
          <button class="add-btn" id="btn-${p.id}" onclick="addToCart(${p.id})">Add to Cart</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function addToCart(id) {
  const p = products.find(x=>x.id===id);
  const ex = cart.find(x=>x.id===id);
  if(ex) ex.qty++; else cart.push({...p,qty:1});
  updateCartCount(); renderCartItems();
  showToast(p.name+' added!');
  const btn = document.getElementById('btn-'+id);
  btn.textContent='✓ Added'; btn.classList.add('added');
  setTimeout(()=>{btn.textContent='Add to Cart';btn.classList.remove('added');},1200);
}
function removeFromCart(id) { cart=cart.filter(i=>i.id!==id); updateCartCount(); renderCartItems(); }
function changeQty(id,d) {
  const item=cart.find(i=>i.id===id); if(!item) return;
  item.qty+=d; if(item.qty<=0) removeFromCart(id); else {updateCartCount();renderCartItems();}
}
function updateCartCount() { document.getElementById('cartCount').textContent=cart.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.qty,0); }
function renderCartItems() {
  const el=document.getElementById('cartItems'), ft=document.getElementById('cartFooter');
  if(!cart.length){el.innerHTML='<div class="cart-empty"><div class="emoji">🌸</div><p>Your cart is empty.<br>Add some beautiful flowers!</p></div>';ft.style.display='none';return;}
  ft.style.display='block';
  document.getElementById('cartTotal').textContent='₹'+cart.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.price*i.qty,0);
  el.innerHTML=cart.map(i=>`<div class="cart-item">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,${i.img}" class="cart-item-img" alt="${i.name}">
    <div class="cart-item-info">
      <div class="cart-item-name">${i.name}</div>
      <div class="cart-item-price">₹${i.price} each</div>
      <div class="cart-item-qty">
        <button class="qty-btn" onclick="changeQty(${i.id},-1)">−</button>
        <span class="qty-num">${i.qty}</span>
        <button class="qty-btn" onclick="changeQty(${i.id},1)">+</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <button class="cart-item-remove" onclick="removeFromCart(${i.id})">✕</button>
  </div>`).join('');
}
function openCart(){document.getElementById('cartDrawer').classList.add('open');document.getElementById('overlay').classList.add('open');}
function closeCart(){document.getElementById('cartDrawer').classList.remove('open');document.getElementById('overlay').classList.remove('open');}
function showToast(msg){const t=document.getElementById('toast');t.textContent='✓ '+msg;t.classList.add('show');setTimeout(()=>t.classList.remove('show'),2000);}
function orderViaWhatsApp(){
  if(!cart.length) return;
  const lines=cart.map(i=>'• '+i.name+' x'+i.qty+' = ₹'+(i.price*i.qty)).join('%0A');
  const total=cart.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.price*i.qty,0);
  window.open('https://wa.me/?text=Hello! I would like to order from Handmade Blooms 🌸%0A%0A'+lines+'%0A%0A*Total: ₹'+total+'*%0A%0APlease confirm availability and delivery. Thank you!','_blank');
}
renderProducts();
</script>
</body>
</html>
